publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 182-185. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: I [recd yrs?] this morn. I have written to my mother today, but not exactly to the effect yr proposed. However it is what I feel to be best, & I hope it will at least do no harm. I have kept
Tho' I slept well, yet I have had a very bad day;-- great distress in my head, & some very queer sensations.
As I slept well, I am surprised at this. I had a dreadful paroxysm of pain at midnight, but when I got rid of it I slept very well,-- so that
I did not expect to be ill today.

I have just made an arrangement, (only experimentally & by the week)-- which will I expect conduce much to my comfort. I have enjoyed instead of the Nurse Miss Boutell , at a guinea a week,-- (the same as I give the Nurse). Miss B-- can do fifty things for

me which the nurse cannot, & the only difference is there she must just breakfast & dine with the , which is no inconvenience whatever. The Nurse has a herself, & so must Miss B--; & as to everything it is the same. It will be a great comfort to me, I believe; & in

2/ but give it up, if it don't do. Miss B-- is so very anxious to succeed, that I doubt not but it will do. My nurse is only useful to me for night-work [double underline}; nothing else. Miss B--, & my maid, will divide that between them.
I find my present nurse very deaf , rather stupid, & not a little vulgar. The
last one was forward & impertinent; & in fact of course an educated person is a great advantage, if on the same pecuniary terms.
These common women are unpleasant, to go on with . You cannot conceive how overwhelmed with joy is Miss B--. She says the one need of her

life is to be near me ; & however menial, she will do anything !-- And I believe it. She is good, true,-- & very unobtrusive. And it is too good a chance for me to refuse trying,-- since it has offered itself to me. I may have to give it up, & indeed I was far from grumbling hitherto,-- but here is a
good thing actually thrown at my feet, worth trying.
